prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base character sheet, redesign the same male student into a fictional Japanese dark-bureaucratic fantasy worldbuilding dossier. Keep his core body type, hairstyle, and face structure consistent, but replace the school uniform concept with 3 official role variants presented as a professional concept-art document on aged white paper with thin grid lines, black ink, muted grayscale, and deep red accent marks. Create a 3-column layout labeled 01, 02, and 03, each showing full-body front, side, and back views of the same character reimagined for a different job. Role 01 should be a tax collection officer in a long black coat with hanging paperwork, armband, shoulder straps, leather belts, and a compact case. Role 02 should be an arcane audit scribe with glasses, layered robe-like outerwear over formal clothes, dangling seals and inspection documents, a ledger or clipboard, writing tools, and a briefcase. Role 03 should be a sealed artifact courier with a military-style cap, face covering, heavier protective coat, straps, tags, and a large transport case plus a backpack-like cargo unit. Add vertical Japanese side notes beside each role, dense bureaucratic labels, official insignias, stamps, serial numbers, and small English sublabels for the role names. At the bottom, include 3 equipment sections, one under each column: for role 01 show exactly 3 items — a hard case, an official stamp, and 2 paper forms; for role 02 show exactly 4 items — a black device/ledger panel, a set of 4 pens, a tray of 6 seal sticks or cartridges, and 1 blue handbook; for role 03 show exactly 4 items — a transport chest, 2 paper tags/forms, 3 hanging sealing tools, and 2 circular sealing tools plus 1 document card. Include an additional footer strip with exactly 4 color swatches, exactly 3 insignia emblems, a notice block, and publication/record information boxes. Overall style: high-end anime concept sheet mixed with occult government archive design, meticulous costume detailing, restrained composition, realistic textile rendering, and a serious institutional mood.
